NOT SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONF., DEPT. 414. JUDGE: SUSAN BREALL; CLERK: SANDRA STARK; (NOT REPORTED)

THE CASE IS REFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 210, HON. THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., FOR SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF GOODWIN, WITH COUNSEL, ANTHONY P. DAVID, ESQ.; THOMAS K. KEHOE, OF NORCAL WASTE SYSTEMS, APPEARS WITH COUNSEL, JAMES W. LUCEY, ESQ. THE COURT CONDUCTS A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THE CASE IS SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO PAY TO PLAINTIFFS $410,000.00, FOLLOWING WHICH PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL, WITH PREJUDICE, OF ALL CLAIMS OF BOTH PLAINTIFFS. EACH SIDE WILL PAY THEIR OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. THE TRIAL DATE HEREIN IS VACATED.
JURY FEES OF 150.00 FOR TRANSACTION A2302129J022 FORFEITED

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-06-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-04-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: The case is referred to Department 210, Hon. Thomas J. Mellon, Jr., for settlement discussions. APPEARANCES: plaintiff Goodwin, with counsel, Anthony P. David, Esq.; Thomas K. Kehoe, of Norcal Waste Systems, appears with counsel, James W. Lucey, Esq. The court conducts a settlement conference. The case is settled as follows: Defendant to pay to plaintiffs $410,000.00, following which plaintiff shall file a Request for Dismissal, with prejudice, of all claims of both plaintiffs. Each side will pay their own attorney fees and costs. The trial date herein is vacated. PRESENT: Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: June Leathley; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti.
